title: BAI Issues Circular for Form-1 for Sportspersons
indian_angle: This circular directly impacts Indian badminton players by outlining the procedure for official documentation.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released a new circular detailing the process for issuing Form-1 to badminton sportspersons.

title: BAI President Sarma Comments on Monkeys at India Open
indian_angle: The comments from the BAI President relate to an incident at a major Indian badminton event, the India Open.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma addressed an unusual incident involving monkeys at the India Open 2026, questioning the concern.

title: Indian Shuttlers Need More Self-Reliance, Says Expert
indian_angle: This opinion piece discusses a crucial aspect of player development for Indian badminton talent, emphasizing independent decision-making during matches.
summary: An article suggests that Indian badminton players should cultivate the ability to make independent decisions on court and perform effectively without constant guidance from coaches.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System for Indian Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, affecting many players.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system is set to be introduced in all domestic badminton tournaments in India, with its first appearance scheduled for Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of a Super 300 event, showcasing his continued presence at the top level.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth was defeated in the final of the US Open, concluding his strong run as a runner-up.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked international player at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan pulled off a major upset at the US Open Super 300, beating the World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.
